name: TMS (Telegram Media Server)
tagline: Manage media downloads via REST API: video URLs, magnets, torrents, and search.
description: Telegram Media Server (TMS) is a Telegram bot that downloads streaming video and torrents (yt-dlp, aria2/qBittorrent) and can serve them via DLNA. Install TMS from https://github.com/NikitaDmitryuk/telegram-media-server (see repo README). This instruction-only skill teaches OpenClaw to control a running TMS via REST: add downloads by URL, magnet, .torrent URL, or torrent_base64, list queued/active/completed items, remove downloads everywhere, and search torrents when Prowlarr is configured. Default same-host URL is supported; use configured TMS_API_KEY whenever TMS API auth is enabled.
